scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs --out-dir dist --external @scopai/core --external duckdb --external fastify --minify --dts
scripts.dev: NODE_ENV=development tsup src/index.ts --format cjs --out-dir dist --external @scopai/core --external duckdb --external fastify --watch --onSuccess 'node dist/index.js'
